name: Very Rocky Road Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2-quart glass measure, cook sugar with 1 cup miniature marshmallows, evaporated milk, and butter on High for 4-1/2 to 6-1/2 minutes until melted, stirring once during cooking.
2. Stir the mixture for an additional 1-1/2 minutes.
3. Stir in chocolate and vanilla until smooth.
4. Fold in nuts and remaining marshmallows.
5. Spread the mixture into a foil-lined 8 x 8 baking pan.
6. Refrigerate until firm.
7. Cut into 24 pieces.
Each piece contains approximately 245 calories, 15g fat, 2mg cholesterol, and 40mg sodium. This recipe can be made in your microwave in 10 minutes or less. It makes a perfect gift for your sweetest friends.
